meta.desc: A restaurant in the downtown area of Szentendre where antiquities, breathtaking interior, delicious food, and great prices await.

home.welcome: We warmly welcome you to our restaurant in the city center of Szentendre. Delicious food, antiques, breathtaking interior, and affordable prices since 1982.

table.title: Table Reservation
content: Table reservation is a simple and convenient way to secure your spot.
If you'd like to make a traditional reservation, don't hesitate to call us at the following phone number:
table.online: For online reservations, you can use the following platforms:

menu.currency: Only Informational price! You can pay with Hungarian Forint (HUF) or Card

group.title: Group Menus
group.text: We can prepare different menus, and we provide commissions for repeated group dining, by agreement. If you are interested in menu prices, please request our current prices by phone or email.

about.title: About Us
about.text: The restaurant was founded by János Németh and his family in 1982, during the time of the Iron Curtain. Its name comes from the main character of Mór Jókai's novel 'Rab Ráby,' who lived in Szentendre and played a major role in the fight against corruption during the reign of Joseph II. The building that was transformed into the restaurant used to be a blacksmith's workshop over 100 years ago. Besides an ethnographic exhibition, the restaurant also features rare curiosities.

404.title: 404 Error
404.desc: The page you are looking for cannot be found.

faq.question: Can I pay by credit/debit card?
faq.answer: Yes, however, we do not accept American Express cards

faq.question: Where can I park?
faq.answer: Parking in Szentendre has changed in 2022: the Old Town can only be accessed with a permit. The nearest parking lot to us is located about a 1-minute walk away, at the Bajcsy-Zsilinszky Endre street. (Zone code: 2012)

faq.question: Where can I find the restaurant?
faq.answer: The restaurant is located in the downtown area of Szentendre, between the City Hall and the Péter Pál Church. It can be reached within a 1-minute walk from the main square, in the center.

faq.question: Is there a garden, terrace?
faq.answer: Yes, the restaurant has a cozy, wind-protected courtyard that is cool and shaded in the summer.

faq.question: Is the restaurant dog-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, we have been a dog-friendly place since open.

faq.question: Do you also cater for events?
faq.answer: Yes, we cater for weddings, baptisms, birthdays, name days, class reunions, book launches, wine tastings, funeral receptions, etc.

faq.question: Is there Wifi?
faq.answer: Yes, without a password. Wifi name: RAB_RÁBY_WIFI

reviews.name: Katalin Novák
reviews.title: President of Hungary
reviews.text: Thank you for providing us a brief respite on a tiring workday and letting us savor genuine homely flavors. With warm regards: Katalin Novák

reviews.name: John Smith
reviews.text: Wow!!! What a find!!! A little gem. I cannot recommend enough. The interior is like a museum and the welcome we received was like being an honoured guest or member of the family. Great food for honest and reasonable price. I cannot recommend enough. Thank you so very much.

reviews.name: Emily Davis
reviews.text: The interior is unique and interesting. The price is reasonable. The food is fresh and we werent waiting for so long to get the food. Its cool ☺️

reviews.name: Michael Johnson
reviews.text: Wonderful place, very cozy, interior is just fantastic. Brilliant service, friendly, quick. Will come back

reviews.name: Sarah Brown
reviews.text: Tourist trap but still fantastic. The goulash is really tasty and served in a metal cauldron. The decoration is... Super... All types of old vintage things, you can stay in the restaurant for 2h and you'll never get bored of looking at the walls. The chairs have coat of arms. Ideal for groups of friends that want to travel back in time and have a great time together.

reviews.name: David White
reviews.text: Best place in Szentandre to get the beloved Hungarian fisherman soup. It comes with a side of peasant bread and some sought of chili paste. You can ask for more bread if you run out. The restaurant is medieval themed and decked fully with interesting items and trinkets. The prices are very reasonable.

reviews.name: Jennifer Clark
reviews.text: Fantastic place, looks like a museum. Food is really good, portions are huge, authentic receipts.

reviews.name: William Hall
reviews.text: The whole restaurant is a museum! Great stuff from different eras well sorted and something for your eyes. But you will forget everything around you when the food arrives.. Great time!

reviews.name: Linda Lewis
reviews.text: The greatest find in Szentandre! The goulash is amazing. Definitely a must when near/in Budapest. This restaurant is worth the trip! :)
